blocks.text: San Siro awaits: Bodo/Glimt 90 minutes from Norwegian football immortality
New numbers show Glimt rank among Europe's elite — only two clubs globally hold better stats. The 3-1 first-leg lead was earned, not lucky. Tonight, San Siro witnesses the Arctic.

blocks.label: ⚽ Wednesday — Champions League Last 16
items: Monaco at PSG 21:00 — PSG lead 3-2, one away goal turns this French derby
Benfica at Real Madrid 21:00 — Bernabéu on a knife's edge, narrow aggregate lead
Dortmund at Atalanta 18:45 — Atalanta need two at home to level the tie
